danger_signals.visual_form: Encroaching dark matter/nebula cloud visual in background and level progression
danger_signals.meaning: Existential threat to human-controlled galaxies; world-state of imminent catastrophe

danger_signals.visual_form: Bullet spray patterns increasing in density; denser patterns on loops
danger_signals.meaning: Escalating danger; loop difficulty increases signal intensifying threat

danger_signals.visual_form: Large-scale mechanical/organic enemy sprites at level endings
danger_signals.meaning: Critical checkpoint threats; progression gates indicating major world-state confrontations
Vulnerability state; player weakening under enemy pressure

danger_signals.visual_form: Solid environmental structures in scrolling backgrounds
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental hazards; level architecture as hostile world-state manifestation

safety_signals.meaning: Weapon upgrade availability; progression toward greater offensive capability
Mobility enhancement; tactical advantage against incoming threats
Temporary invulnerability state; defensive world-state mitigation
Safe resumption points; world-state recovery opportunities
Extra lives acquisition pathway; survival sustainability

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Earth-origin technology aesthetics; sci-fi federation military design language

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Super Mech robot dictator; Black Nebula space matter manifestation
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Diverse enemy sprite types representing armada composition; boss variants at level endpoints
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Hostile space environments; corrupted/darkened cosmic backdrops representing Black Nebula spread

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Early level backgrounds showing colonized space infrastructure; stars and galaxies
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player begins at full power; baseline enemy patterns establish threat baseline

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Progressive darkening/corruption of background environments across levels; nebula cloud visual expansion
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy patterns intensify; boss encounters escalate in complexity; stage hazards increase

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Climactic boss sprite designs; Super Mech visual representation; densest visual complexity
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Most complex enemy attack patterns; highest difficulty spike; progression gate

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Return to stage 1 with visual persistence of prior destruction; implicit world-state cycling
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Denser bullet patterns; increased enemy aggression; difficulty curve reset at higher baseline

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Firepower/speed visual reduction; weapon effect downgrade
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Reduced offensive output; slower movement; temporary weakened state until power-up collection

environmental_storytelling.example: Constantly scrolling environments tell story of advancing through hostile space toward Super Mech; visual journey through claimed/corrupted territories
Each level's background and enemy design becomes increasingly hostile/mechanized, showing deeper penetration into enemy territory
End-of-level bosses serve as visual manifestations of Super Mech's armada power hierarchy; each boss design communicates faction technological advancement
Stage obstacles represent environmental hazards/defensive structures of Black Nebula space matter; hostile geography as world-state communication
Player weapon upgrades (P icons) visually enhance shot patterns on-screen, communicating tactical progression through visual effect multiplication

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Responsive to directional input; fires selected weapon; collects pickups; progresses through level
Firepower downgrade (visual); speed reduction (behavioral); temporary vulnerability until power-up recovery
Attack pattern execution; movement patterns; fire at player; dense patterns increase with progression/loops
Complex attack pattern deployment; high health pool; level progression gate; defeat triggers stage completion
Visual manifestation through background corruption; implicit behavioral threat through stage design and enemy spawning patterns

notes: Hellfire communicates world-state primarily through visual progression (background corruption by Black Nebula), enemy pattern escalation, and firepower feedback loops. Faction identity relies on spacecraft design (Space Federation CNCS1) versus boss/enemy sprite design (Super Mech armada). Political situation (human colonization vs. robot dictator threat) established through narrative framing but visually reinforced through level progression as territorial penetration. Genesis version additions (Hellfire bomb, shield, satellite option) expand visual safety-signal vocabulary. Loop mechanic serves as meta-commentary on escalating difficulty and cyclical threat renewal.
